text: Support the real statement formats needed by the two banks through versioned local source adapters.
target: Each adopted adapter is proven against redacted representative fixtures and fails closed on an unsupported, password-protected, scanned, structurally changed, resource-exhausting, or semantically incomplete source instead of guessing. Evidence: assumption — A1 is unvalidated because no extracts were available; OQ-INGEST-1/2/3/5 require a pre-planning fixture spike.
